sentences.purpose: Describe the nature of basic conversation

label: semantic-concept
children.text: The most basic kind of conversation

label: structure-object
children.text: two people who are talking to each other

label: semantic-event
semanticTree.text: Typically, one of them initiates it and they take turns talking about some common topic or set of topics

sentences.purpose: Explain the cooperative nature of conversation

label: semantic-goal
semanticTree.text: Maintaining the turn-taking and keeping to the topic at hand (or shifting topics in a permissible fashion) takes a certain amount of cooperation

label: semantic-purpose
semanticTree.text: Conversations generally serve the purpose of polite social interaction
